subject: FW: from howard gardner
body:
Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
 
 

________________________________

From: Methusula [mailto:Methusula@pz.harvard.edu] 
Sent: Saturday, June 28, 2008 4:55 PM
To: Lesley Groff; littlestjeff@yahoo.com
Cc: winner@bc.edu; Jessica Creighton
Subject: from howard gardner


 Hello, Lesley/Jeffrey,
I understand that you were trying to reach me by phone on Friday.  I am
in Tallberg Switzerland, off the map and not reachable by phone.
On Monday afternoon and evening, Stockholm time, I should be reachable
at the Radison SAS Arlandia Hotel 46 █ ████  On Tuesday
I will be in transit,  Wednesday PM in the office and then off to Aspen
for a few days where I should be reachable by cell (Howard
617 ███ █████; Ellen 617 ███ █████).
I hope that you are well and that all is well.
Best howard
